description: Deploy remaining Marketing and Lead Intelligence n8n workers

stories.title: Content Freshness Monitor Worker
stories.description: n8n workflow that monitors website content age, identifies stale pages (>90 days without update), and alerts for review. Checks /programs/ and key landing pages.
acceptance: Scans all program pages for last-modified dates
Identifies pages older than 90 days threshold

stories.title: Broken Resource Monitor Worker
stories.description: n8n workflow that checks for broken images, scripts, and stylesheets across the website. Reports 404s and missing resources.
acceptance: Crawls all pages for resource references
Logs broken resources to resource_health table

stories.title: Campaign Analyst Worker
stories.description: n8n workflow that analyzes campaign_funnel view daily, calculates key metrics (engagement rate, conversion rate, channel performance), stores insights in campaign_metrics table, and alerts on significant changes (>10% variance).
acceptance: Queries campaign_funnel view for all active campaigns

stories.title: A/B Test Manager Worker
stories.description: n8n workflow that monitors message_variants performance, calculates statistical significance using chi-square test, auto-pauses underperforming variants when significance threshold (95%) reached.
acceptance: When p < 0.05, marks winner and pauses losers

stories.title: Content Performance Tracker Worker
stories.description: n8n workflow that tracks engagement metrics by message content type, identifies top-performing message templates, and generates weekly content performance report.
acceptance: Groups by message_type (connection_request, follow_up, email, etc.)
Calculates: open_rate, click_rate, reply_rate by type

stories.title: Lead Scoring Engine Worker
stories.description: n8n workflow that calculates lead scores based on engagement signals (opens, clicks, replies, calls), updates lifecycle_tag automatically, and triggers GHL branch routing when thresholds met.
acceptance: Workflow triggers on new campaign_activity events
Calculates weighted score: opens(1), clicks(3), replies(10), calls(15)
Auto-updates lifecycle_tag based on score thresholds

stories.title: Engagement Decay Monitor Worker
stories.description: n8n workflow that identifies contacts whose engagement is declining (no activity in 14+ days after initial engagement), triggers re-engagement workflows, and updates engagement_level field.
acceptance: Finds contacts with first_engagement_at but no activity in 14 days

stories.title: Re-engagement Trigger Worker
stories.description: n8n workflow that activates dormant contacts through personalized outreach based on their engagement history, tracks re-engagement success rates.
acceptance: Workflow triggers when engagement_decay_monitor queues contacts
Retrieves contact's engagement history from campaign_activity
Selects appropriate re-engagement template based on history
Triggers GHL sequence or Smartlead email

stories.title: Invoice Generator Worker
stories.description: n8n workflow that generates invoices for corporate training bookings, integrates with Stripe for invoice creation, and stores invoice records in Supabase.
acceptance: Workflow triggers on corporate booking requests
Creates Stripe invoice with line items
Stores invoice record in invoices table

stories.title: Payment Reminder Worker
stories.description: n8n workflow that sends payment reminders for unpaid invoices at 7, 14, and 30 day intervals, escalates to phone outreach after 30 days.
acceptance: Queries invoices table for unpaid items
Sends appropriate reminder based on age
Logs all reminders to invoice_reminders table

stories.title: Group Discount Manager Worker
stories.description: n8n workflow that automatically applies group discounts based on registration count, validates discount codes, and tracks discount usage.
acceptance: Tracks discount usage in discounts table
